Red Resistance Stone  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: RANGE
AC: 1
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +1 DEX: +1 STA: +1 CHA: +1 WIS: +1 INT: +1 AGI: +1
SV FIRE: +35
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Red Resistance Stone
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: RANGE
AC: 1
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +1 DEX: +1 STA: +1 CHA: +1 WIS: +1 INT: +1 AGI: +1
SV FIRE: +35
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Misc
Light:Paw of Opalla
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-10 09:48:44
Page Updated:Sun Jan 21st, 2018

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
King's Court Casino

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Kerafyrm's Lair (Sleeper's Tomb)
NPC Name
sleeper 1.0 - Nanzata the Warder


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Kerafyrm's Lair (Sleeper's Tomb)
Shadow Haven
Send a correction
Post Comment
What a joke
QuoteReply
# Jan 04 2005 at 5:00 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591755792772
55 posts
Got it in casino and hit destroy.

Sorry but the day I sacrifice a Carved Vrex Totem for that piece of rubbish is the day I'll quit.

If at least it were droppable, then at least it could benefit someone else but this is a joke.

/bye Casino, it's so not worth trying.
▲ Page top
RE: What a joke
QuoteReply
# Jan 04 2005 at 8:01 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255473800
Scholar
619 posts
/sigh

You're comparing a Velious era item to a Gates era item.

and yeah I know it's from the casino, but fact remains its a velious item.

Resist high?
QuoteReply
# Nov 29 2004 at 3:53 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592261140033
12 posts
LOL that item is pfft!!!! https://everquest.allakhazam.com/db/adv_search.html?classes=3&race=1&type=Range+Slot&effect=9999&fzone=0&foodtype=0&smod=0&stype=0&stat1=None&statlim1=0&stat2=None&statlim2=0&stat3=None&statlim3=0&pristat=ac&priwt=2&secstat=hp&secwt=1&tristat=none&triwt=0&level=&price=&qt=b&aug=y&st=
▲ Page top
Chaos
QuoteReply
# Jun 08 2002 at 10:17 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591767836239
View User Forum
28 posts
Insert chaos here....items like this confuse when they aren’t for a quest..."hay ever quest team, come here quick, free hits of cid"...Games can be fun just for their own sake, chill out and let loose with some truly creative game play. The world is amazing for just its technical side, time to put some "art" into the story. A good role playing game engages its audience with plot and story line as well as loot and adventure. As star wars “attack of the clones” is showing us visually, you can’t tell a story with just technology, flashy computer tech can only get you so far. – “what I like the game, I just think it can be better” – Unknown
▲ Page top
well thats a damn good item
QuoteReply
# Jan 26 2002 at 12:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249412098
View User Forum
13 posts

#Anonymous, Posted: May 30 2001 at 7:17 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I dont understand this item. It adds 1 to a lot of stats and has fire resist. Big deal. BTW why is it called a resistance stone?

QuoteReply
# May 30 2001 at 7:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758644668
157 posts
There is one for magic resist too
▲ Page top
RE: I dont understand this?
QuoteReply
# May 30 2001 at 7:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758644668
157 posts
Red=fire (i hope u get that )
Resistance=it adds HUGE fire RESIST!
And to find 35 resist on a range item is rare!

Sheane
▲ Page top
RE: I dont understand this?
QuoteReply
# May 30 2001 at 7:36 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245673499
47 posts
Because it's a ranged slot item that adds 35 to your fire resistance... That IS a big deal when you fight creatures that kill you without touching you :). I assume, since there's a Blue one that adds cold, that there is one stone for each resistance.
▲ Page top
Jeepers
QuoteReply
# May 30 2001 at 3:20 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Please dont ask what its for, I hope its obvious to everyone.
▲ Page top
Not useless
QuoteReply
# May 29 2001 at 9:03 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591757613820
12 posts
If you read what the Verant spokespeople have been saying, you will see them talking about being unable to increase the overall power of characters. Instead they are making items that make characters more powerful in certain situations. This is one such item.

Porkins

badass
QuoteReply
# May 29 2001 at 8:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591754040756
10 posts
Lets see, a range item that gives plus 1 too all stats and "35" to 1 resist. I think thats badass
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: May 29 2001 at 6:04 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) what are these for? Unless they're for a quest, the resistances are the only good part. I am fairly sure these are the best resistances for the range slot.
